title: TrailCurrent Playbill — Headwaters API credentials
description: Stored separately from settings.json because it contains a secret. The Settings → Headwaters screen in the GUI is the only thing that writes to it.

apiKey.description: API key used to authenticate calls to the Headwaters HTTP APIs. Persisted at file mode 0600. Never published over MQTT or written to logs.

omdbApiKey.description: OMDb API key used by the DVD-library lookup flow. Shares this file with apiKey because both are user-pasted credentials; the DVD handler reads/writes it via a permissive view of the same store.
